name: 16S_V6_Actinobacteria
description: 16S rRNA hypervariable region V6 in phylum Actinobacteria. Approximately 57 bp on the E. coli numbering scheme (positions 986-1043). High-GC Gram-positive; e.g. Bifidobacterium, Mycobacterium, Corynebacterium. Species- to genus-level discriminating; real biological variation expected — allow high mismatch during mapping.
